name: Sadie's Shrimp Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni and drain thoroughly.
2. In a large bowl, mix the cooked macaroni with shrimp, eggs, onions, celery, olives, and pickles. Toss well to combine.
3. In another bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, olive oil, hot sauce, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and ketchup until smooth.
4. Pour the dressing over the macaroni and seafood mixture. Mix gently until all ingredients are evenly coated.
5. Refrigerate for at least one hour before serving to allow flavors to meld.
6. You may need to make additional dressing if the salad absorbs it quickly.
Serves 30 people for a real picnic or party.
